# Wordize for .NET Documentation

Official product documentation for Wordize for .NET.

## Product Overview
- [Wordize for .NET](https://docs.wordize.com/): Overview of the product and its modular architecture
- [Licensing and Subscription](https://docs.wordize.com/licensing-and-subscription.md): Licensing and subscription options, evaluation free access, how to apply for Wordize License
- [Supported Document Formats](https://docs.wordize.com/supported-document-formats.md): List of formats supported by Wordize and conversion modules

## Getting Started
- [System Requirements](https://docs.wordize.com/system-requirements.md): Platform and dependency requirements for Wordize
- [Installation](https://docs.wordize.com/installation.md): How to install Wordize (NuGet) and apply licenses

## Configuration
- [Setting License](https://docs.wordize.com/setting-license.md): Applying license files and activation. Applying licenses for multiple Wordize products
- [Configuring Fonts](https://docs.wordize.com/configuring-fonts.md): Font setup and substitution guid
- [Hyphenation](https://docs.wordize.com/hyphenation.md): Hyphenation options and language support
- [Text Shaping](https://docs.wordize.com/text-shaping.md): Typography and shaping settings. How to install HarfBuzz

## Developer Guide
- [Convert From One Format to Another](https://docs.wordize.com/conversion.md): Convert documents from one format to another, ensuring high fidelity and preserving formatting, styles, and content
- [Compare Documents](https://docs.wordize.com/comparison.md): Document comparison and diff generation
- [Reporting (LINQ)](https://docs.wordize.com/linq-reporting.md): Building reports with the LINQ reporting engine
- [Mail Merge](https://docs.wordize.com/mail-merge.md): Automated personalized document generation with Mail merge
- [Search and Replace](https://docs.wordize.com/replacement.md): Find/replace features including regex support
- [Merge Documents](https://docs.wordize.com/merge.md): Combining multiple documents programmatically
- [Split Large Documents](https://docs.wordize.com/splitting.md): Splitting documents by pages, sections, styles, and page ranges
- [Sign with Digital Signature](https://docs.wordize.com/signature.md): Working with digital signatures
- [Add Watermark](https://docs.wordize.com/watermark.md): Adding text/image watermarks
- [Use AI-powered Features](https://docs.wordize.com/ai.md): AI-assisted capabilities and examples - translate and summarize documents, check grammar using AI

## Additional Resources
- [Technical Support](https://docs.wordize.com/support.md): How to get help and support channels
- [FAQ](https://docs.wordize.com/faq.md): Frequently asked questions
- [Download / NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/Wordize)
